meta.title: Het Moederbord - Board & Committees - {SIT}
meta.description: Het Moederbord: the board and committees of SIT in one org chart. Board XII is the core, every committee a module you can plug in. Plug yourself in.
meta.ogDescription: Board XII is the core, every committee a module. Discover how SIT is organised and join in.

strip.heading: The Motherboard of SIT. The official student association of HBO-ICT
